title: callerya eriantha
intro: Callerya eriantha, also known as the "Chinese snake flower" or "Yin Yang Huo", is a type of flowering plant native to China and Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Gentianaceae. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, anti-oxidant, and anti-bacterial activities. The health benefits of Callerya eriantha include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a decoction or tea, and can also be found in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
